description: Ambiguous outcome — contact says 'I'll try to come' without firm commitment. Tests prompt sensitivity between tentative vs confirmed.

transcript.content: Hi Meera, this is Priya calling from Freedom with AI. How are you doing today?
I'm fine. Tell me what's this call about?
We're hosting a free masterclass on AI automation this Saturday at 3 PM. It's designed for business owners who want to save time using AI tools.
Yes, this Saturday, March 15th at 3 PM. It's online so you can join from anywhere.
I have some work in the afternoon but I'll try to come. What time does it end?
It's about 90 minutes, so by 4:30 PM. Shall I send you the details on WhatsApp?
Yeah send the link. I'll try to make it but I can't promise. Depends on my client meeting.
No problem at all. I'll send you the details and you can decide. Even if you join a bit late, you'll still get value from it.
Great, I'll send that over. Have a nice day, Meera!
